title: aeluropus macrostachyus
intro: Aeluropus macrostachyus, also known as desert broomgrass or desert hairgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the Middle East and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aeluropus macrostachyus include relief from various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory problems. Aeluropus macrostachyus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal preparations.
